name: testCreateDeleteUserAccount
description: Create new User account, delete it and verify that account was created and deleted successfully

testStage.description: Create new User account, delete it and verify that account was created and deleted successfully

steps.name: Fill all mandatory fields in the signup form
Verify that account was created successfully
Verify that account was deleted successfully
